subject: [RFC PATCH 24/40] mm: page_alloc: prevent UNMOVABLE/RECLAIMABLE mixing in pageblocks

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch prevents the mixing of UNMOVABLE and RECLAIMABLE pages in pageblocks by tightening two paths in the page allocator: try_to_claim_block() and __rmqueue_steal(). The patch introduces a helper function noncompatible_cross_type() to detect the UNMOVABLE-RECLAIMABLE pair, and modifies these functions to prevent cross-type relabeling or stealing. This change aims to reduce internal fragmentation caused by sticky RECLAIMABLE pages in pageblocks with both types of pages.
